title: stelis imraei
intro: Stelis imraei is a species of orchid native to Costa Rica. It has been studied for its medicinal properties, particularly its flavonoid and phenolic compounds, which have been shown to possess antioxidant and anti-inflammatory activities. The health benefits of Stelis imraei include its potential to protect against oxidative stress, inflammation, and cell damage, as well as its possible antidiabetic and antimicrobial effects. Stelis imraei can be used in herbal preparations such as infusions, tinctures, and extracts, which may be used to support overall health and well-being.
